files.left.yaml:
version: "1.2.0"
name: "left"
extends:
  - "common.yaml"
guards:
  egress_allowlist:
    allow:
      - "api.example.com"
    block: []
    default_action: block
files.right.yaml:
version: "1.2.0"
name: "right"
extends:
  - "common.yaml"
guards:
  mcp_tool:
    allow: []
    block:
      - "danger_tool"
    default_action: allow

files.base.yaml:
version: "1.2.0"
name: "base"
guards:
  patch_integrity:
    max_additions: 5
    max_deletions: 50
    require_balance: true
    max_imbalance_ratio: 1
files.child.yaml:
version: "1.2.0"
name: "child"
extends:
  - "base.yaml"
merge_strategy: deep_merge
guards:
  patch_integrity:
    require_balance: false
